delivery_status.description: The current status of the delivery.

currency.description: The currency code for monetary amounts.

order_value.description: The total value of the order in cents.

pickup_address.description: The full street address for the pickup location.

pickup_business_name.description: The business name at the pickup location.

pickup_phone_number.description: The phone number at the pickup location.

pickup_time_estimated.description: The estimated pickup time in UTC ISO-8601 format.

pickup_time_actual.description: The actual pickup time in UTC ISO-8601 format.

dropoff_address.description: The full street address for the dropoff location.

dropoff_business_name.description: The business name at the dropoff location.

dropoff_phone_number.description: The phone number at the dropoff location.

dropoff_time_estimated.description: The estimated dropoff time in UTC ISO-8601 format.

dropoff_time_actual.description: The actual dropoff time in UTC ISO-8601 format.

dropoff_contact_given_name.description: The first name of the dropoff contact.

dropoff_contact_family_name.description: The last name of the dropoff contact.

dasher_id.description: The unique identifier for the assigned Dasher.

dasher_name.description: The first name of the assigned Dasher.

dasher_phone_number.description: The phone number of the assigned Dasher.

tracking_url.description: A URL for tracking the delivery in real time.

force_batch_id.description: The batch identifier for grouped deliveries.

created_at.description: The timestamp when the delivery was created.

updated_at.description: The timestamp when the delivery was last updated.
